name: Recipefork Cooking Tips Display
description: Display card for recipe-specific cooking tips on Recipefork detail pages, replacing generic static tips with author-provided notes.

bullet-list.description: Sidebar or support-surface bullet list of recipe-specific cooking tips.

slots.tip-items: Bullet list of concise author-provided tips

visual_brief: This should feel practical and low-friction. It replaces generic filler with real creator knowledge, so it should read like trusted notes rather than a decorative sidebar.
